testcase.name: example_tm_a_mmrm.Rd
testcase.system-out: values(selected = "FKSI-FWB") - Setting explicit `selected` while `choices` are delayed (set using `tidyselect`) doesn't guarantee that `selected` is a subset of `choices`. Backtrace: x 1. +-teal.modules.clinical (local) with_mocked_app_bindings(...) at test-examples.R:124:5 2. | +-testthat::with_mocked_bindings(...) at test-examples.R:106:3 3. | \-testthat::with_mocked_bindings(...) at test-examples.R:106:3 4. +-teal.modules.clinical (local) suppress_warnings(...) at test-examples.R:106:3 5. | \-base::withCallingHandlers(...) at test-examples.R:20:3 6. +-testthat::expect_no_error(...) 7. | \-testthat:::expect_no_(...) 8. | \-testthat:::quasi_capture(enquo(object), NULL, capture) 9. | +-testthat (local) .capture(...) 10. | | +-base::withRestarts(...) 11. | | | \-base (local) withOneRestart(expr, restarts[[1L]]) 12. | | | \-base (local) doWithOneRestart(return(expr), restart) 13. | | \-base::withCallingHandlers(...) 14. | \-rlang::eval_bare(quo_get_expr(.quo), quo_get_env(.quo)) 15. \-pkgload::run_example(...) 16. \-base::source(tmp, echo = !quiet, local = env, max.deparse.length = Inf) 17. +-base::withVisible(eval(ei, envir)) 18. \-base::eval(ei, envir) 19. \-base::eval(ei, envir) 20. +-teal::init(...) 21. | +-checkmate::assert(...) 22. | | \-base::eval(dots[[i]], envir = env) 23. | | \-base::eval(dots[[i]], envir = env) 24. | \-checkmate::check_multi_class(modules, c("teal_modules", "teal_module")) 25. +-teal::modules(...) 26. +-teal.modules.clinical::tm_a_mmrm(...) 27. +-teal.modules.clinical:::tm_a_mmrm.default(...) 28. | \-checkmate::assert_class(paramcd_values, "values") 29. | \-checkmate::checkClass(x, classes, ordered, null.ok) 30. \-teal.picks::values(selected = "FKSI-FWB") 31. \-teal.picks:::.pick(...)

testcase.name: e2e_tm_t_binary_outcome_Module_initializes_in_teal_without_errors_and_produces_table_output.
testcase.failure:
Expected `self$get_html(".shiny-output-error-validation")` to be NULL. Differences: `actual` is a character vector ('
Some inputs require attention\n\n`Responders` field is empty\n\n
') `expected` is NULL No validation error is observed Backtrace: x 1. \-app_driver$expect_no_validation_error() at test-shinytest2-tm_t_binary_outcome.R:91:3 2. \-testthat::expect_null(...)

testcase.name: e2e_tm_t_binary_outcome_Starts_with_specified_label_paramcd_responders_arm_var_buckets_u_diff_ci_u_diff_test_strata_var_s_diff_ci_prop_ci_method_conf_level_aval_var_compare_arms_combine_comp_arms_u_odds_ratio_show_rsp_cat.
testcase.error: Error in `callback(...)`: code: -32000 message: DOM Error while querying Backtrace: x 1. +-testthat::expect_equal(...) at test-shinytest2-tm_t_binary_outcome.R:108:5 2. | \-testthat::quasi_label(enquo(object), label) 3. | \-rlang::eval_bare(expr, quo_get_env(quo)) 4. +-base::as.vector(get_teal_picks_slot(app_driver, "paramcd", "values")) 5. \-teal.modules.clinical:::get_teal_picks_slot(...) 6. \-teal.modules.clinical:::open_teal_picks_dropdown(...) at ./helper-TealAppDriver.R:59:3 7. \-app_driver$click(paste0("#", badge_ns)) at ./helper-TealAppDriver.R:50:3 8. \-super$click(...) 9. \-shinytest2:::app_click(...) 10. \-shinytest2:::app_find_node_id(...) 11. \-shinytest2:::chromote_find_elements(...) 12. +-base::unlist(chromote_session$DOM$querySelectorAll(root_id, css)$nodeIds) 13. \-chromote_session$DOM$querySelectorAll(root_id, css) 14. \-self$wait_for(p) 15. \-self$parent$wait_for(p) 16. \-chromote:::synchronize(p, loop = private$child_loop) 17. +-promises::with_promise_domain(...) 18. | \-domain$wrapSync(expr) 19. | \-base::force(expr) 20. \-base::tryCatch(...) 21. \-base (local) tryCatchList(expr, classes, parentenv, handlers) 22. \-base (local) tryCatchOne(expr, names, parentenv, handlers[[1L]]) 23. \-base (local) doTryCatch(return(expr), name, parentenv, handler)

testcase.name: e2e_tm_t_binary_outcome_Selecting_paramcd_changes_the_table_and_does_not_throw_validation_errors.

testcase.name: e2e_tm_t_binary_outcome_Selecting_responders_changes_the_table_and_does_not_throw_validation_errors.
testcase.failure: Expected `identical(table_before, app_driver$get_active_module_table_output("table-table-with-settings"))` to be FALSE. Differences: `actual`: TRUE `expected`: FALSE

testcase.name: e2e_tm_t_binary_outcome_Selecting_responders_changes_the_table_and_does_not_throw_validation_errors.
testcase.failure:
Expected `self$get_html(".shiny-output-error-validation")` to be NULL. Differences: `actual` is a character vector ('
Some inputs require attention\n\n`Responders` field is empty\n\n
') `expected` is NULL No validation error is observed Backtrace: x 1. \-app_driver$expect_no_validation_error() at test-shinytest2-tm_t_binary_outcome.R:203:5 2. \-testthat::expect_null(...)

testcase.name: e2e_tm_t_binary_outcome_Deselection_of_responders_throws_validation_error.

failure.message: Expected `identical(app_driver$get_text(".shiny-validation-message"), "`Responders` field is empty")` to be FALSE. ('test-shinytest2-tm_t_binary_outcome.R:211:3')

testcase.failure: Expected `identical(app_driver$get_text(".shiny-validation-message"), "`Responders` field is empty")` to be FALSE. Differences: `actual`: TRUE `expected`: FALSE
